from __future__ import annotations

def per_item_copy_of_large_config_or_context_object_positive():
    config = {"region": "us", "timeout": 30, "retries": 5, "feature_x": True}
    jobs = [1, 2, 3]
    work_items = []
    for job in jobs:
        local = dict(config)
        local["job_id"] = job
        work_items.append(local)
    return work_items
